item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Skilled skater ghost rides his skates
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: My boy told me the time is coming, so we are going to travel across the us for one last big adventure.
item.description:
12 years old and we learned how to do this life together
I found him on the streets of Mexico when he was 7 months old
I always promised, if I have a dog. He is going to see as much of this life as possible
From climbing volcanos in my truck
The rivers and falls
He never once left my side
My heart is breaking but this is going to be our biggest journey yet
We will drive to the red wood Forrest
Slowly, while we enjoy everyone moment without time limits
After we will head to the coast line and chase each other on the beach again while splashing in the sea.
When you say you are ready
We will return to the place where we first met
And we will cuddle on the hammocks once again
While I read you bedtime stories and rock you till you fall asleep, just like when we were young.
I hope I can give you just a part
Of everything you gave to me
Forever
And always the greatest thing to ever happen to me.
I love you guapo. Couldn’t have made it without you taking care of me.
item.dc:creator: orangefirefly

item.title: He asked for a sewing machine for Christmas, and the first thing he made was for his sister.
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: Pillars Of Creation and The Crab Pulsar
item.description:
The James Webb Space Telescope view of the Pillars Of Creation. It's believed that they were being eroded and torn asunder several 1000s of years ago by galactic winds, but the light of that event hasn't reached us yet.
This is the Crab Pulsar, observed for the last 20 years, and the images have been combined to make this time lapse. The energy being released is incredible. #the_more_you_know #awesome #space #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: NASA’s Parker Solar probe is the first to successfully record video & audio of our sun’s solar winds
item.dc:creator: JohnnieJohnnieYesPapa

item.title: We love woodworking, it's neat !
item.description:
Dovetail router bit
2 :: Extremely Sharp Wood Chisel
Finger joint router bit
4 :: Turning wooden dice blanks
Sloyd knife used for wood carving
Japanese Chisel
8 :: Wooden Table Top Restoration
Steaming and bending wood
10 :: Wood splitter
Satisfyingly Splitting the logs using this machine
12 :: The ultimate woodworking challenge: Mastering the perfect stair railing. This one is crazy.
Satisfying Peeling Of Wooden Block. Source : toolgifs (on reddit) and others. Enjoy !

item.title: Sunday morning thoughts
item.description: A picture showing a post from Existential Comics @ existentialcoms Asking: Why are ethics questions always like: "is it ethical to steal bread to feed your starving family?" And not: "is it ethical to hoard bread when families are starving?"

item.title: Here's a Heads-up
item.description: Screenshot taken from Bluesky The Russian disinformation network "Matryoshka" has launched a new campaign on Bluesky. Eliot Higgins, founder of the investigative journalism group Bellingcat, has been one of the first researchers to detect its activity. So far, four Russian-made fake videos have been identified on the platform. Link to the article from The Insider: https://theins.ru/en/news/277378
item.dc:creator: AdventureRoute69

item.title: May the memes be with you or whatever.
item.description:
I posted this before I heard the horrible news about Aubrey Plaza’s husband’s untimely death today. Our sincere condolences go out to her.
We are expecting 10-12” tomorrow night. And my snowblower needs to be fixed.

item.title: Anthony Bourdain about putin
item.description:
Screenshot of a #Bluesky post containing a short videoclip with Anthony Bourdain Text: Tony Bourdain talking about Putin in 2014 I miss him every. single. day Sauce: https://bsky.app/profile/pdxeleven.bsky.social/post/3lez5ykgfxc25 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Edit: Here's an article about 'When Anthony Bourdain Called Out Putin and Trump—in Russia' sauce: https://www.thedailybeast.com/when-anthony-bourdain-called-out-putin-and-trumpin-russia/
The short videoclip with Anthony Bourdain
item.dc:creator: AdventureRoute69
